title: Kalimba
noAudio: Audio is unavailable in this browser
profTagline: A full-screen 17-tine thumb piano — play in landscape, switch tunings, play ready songs (Avatar: Leaves from the Vine) or let Flow auto-generate a melody (a research-backed melodic search: consonance, voice-leading, resolution). Every note synthesised live, no files, offline.
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
